# emissiveColor

**Instance Property**

The emissive color of the material.

## Declaration

```swift
var emissiveColor: GLKVector4 { get set }
```

## Material Properties

- **ambientColor**: The ambient color of the material.
- **diffuseColor**: The diffuse color of the material.
- **shininess**: The shininess of the material, used when calculating specular lighting effects.
- **specularColor**: The specular color of the material.
